growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Barron's reported today that Micron is bouncing after SK Hynix warned memory pricing is abnormal but still projected nearly 60% memory-demand growth next year, with supply tight through at least 2027-2028.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Micron combines cheap forward earnings with powerful AI-memory pricing, tight HBM/DRAM supply, FCF generation, and significant target upside.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Credo is highlighting next-generation connectivity for AI infrastructure at the TSMC 2026 symposium while its FY2026 revenue reached $437 million, up 157% year over year, showing real demand for its AI networking and optical interconnect stack.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Credo combines extreme AI connectivity growth, strong margins, net cash/liquidity and a meaningful pullback at a less stretched forward multiple than peers.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Simply Wall St said on July 6 that ServiceNow's Now Assist and AI Control Tower are already contributing to guidance and customer demand, showing AI monetization inside mission-critical enterprise workflows.
growth_picks.analyst_take: High-quality workflow software reset with 22% revenue growth, strong FCF, a near-term Q2 print, and credible AI monetization through Now Assist and AI Control Tower.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: The Department of War awarded Lockheed a $502.4M post-production support contract on July 7 and a July 9 Navy order for submarine electronic warfare systems, while today’s WSJ/FT coverage says Lockheed is building a cheaper Patriot interceptor to replenish depleted stockpiles; that combination points to sustained missile-defense demand even after the shares have already rerated.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Lockheed offers a reasonable defense valuation, FCF, a 26% drawdown, and fresh missile-defense catalysts from Patriot and THAAD demand.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: On July 7, 2026, NATO allies announced the purchase of up to five MQ-4C Triton aircraft, directly widening Northrop's ISR production and long-duration maritime surveillance backlog.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Northrop is a defensive-quality buy after a 32% drawdown, with NATO ISR demand and reasonable valuation supporting near-term earnings.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Commerce said on July 16 that TSMC will add another $100B of U.S. semiconductor investment for a total of $265B, and AP reported TSMC raised 2026 capex to $60-64B; the market sold the shares on ROI worries even though the policy backdrop is still pushing hard to reshore advanced chip capacity.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Best-in-class AI foundry compounder with record Q2 results and raised capex confirming demand, but near-term upside is capped by very high expectations.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Vertiv opened its Johor, Malaysia facility on July 1 to expand power, cooling, and digital infrastructure for AI and high-density computing, and recent coverage still frames the company as a core physical bottleneck beneficiary of the AI buildout.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Vertiv remains a core AI data-center power and cooling beneficiary with earnings catalyst ahead, though valuation leaves little room for execution misses.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: ADBE is 36.9% below its high even though it remains highly profitable and screens at just 8.6x forward earnings with a 0.60 PEG; the next dated catalyst is the September 11, 2026 Q3 report, and the current tape still reflects the IBM-led software selloff, but the bear case is that the AI narrative may stay discounted for longer.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Adobe is a very profitable software franchise trading at a depressed forward multiple, but AI disruption keeps conviction below high.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Accenture is more than 51% below its 52-week high and still throws off strong cash flow, with Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings set for October 1, 2026; the opportunity is a blue-chip consulting franchise sold on sector fear, but the bear case is that consulting demand and federal spending remain softer than the market wants.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Accenture is a cash-generative consulting compounder priced cheaply after a severe drawdown, with AI demand offset by slower bookings.

catalysts_general: Discovery: The CEO bought stock after the post-earnings slide, which is a useful signal when a large-cap managed-care name is under pressure.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Elevance offers a cheap managed-care rebound setup supported by insider buying and raised guidance, but Medicaid cost pressure is unresolved.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Barron's reported on July 20 that IREN signed $2.8 billion of new multiyear AI-developer contracts and lifted projected annualized AI-cloud revenue above $4 billion, confirming its neocloud pivot is producing real contracted demand.
growth_picks.analyst_take: IREN has real contracted AI-cloud demand and large upside, but negative FCF, leverage, and extreme beta prevent a high-conviction call.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Barron's said on July 20 that Hut 8 signed a 15-year, $9.8 billion lease at Beacon Point in Texas, doubling computing capacity to 704 MW and giving its AI data-center buildout unusually long-duration visibility.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Hut 8 has a long-duration AI data-center contract that validates the pivot, but the financial profile is still speculative.

catalysts_general: Discovery: ADW Capital Management and Adam D. Wyden filed a Schedule 13D on Jul 16 with 14.5M shares, or 19.3% of the company, and explicitly called for an immediate strategic review and orderly liquidation, citing value north of $50 to $60 per share.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Activist pressure creates an asymmetric event-driven setup, but leverage and negative free cash flow keep this below high conviction.

catalysts_general: Discovery: On Jul 9 the board approved a share repurchase authorization of up to $500M through Dec. 31, 2028, and paired it with upgraded full-year guidance, a strong capital-return signal at a newly public industrial platform.
growth_picks.analyst_take: A 50%+ drawdown, raised 2026 outlook and large buyback create a credible rebound setup despite cyclicality and leverage.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Charter has a fresh CEO buy of about $1.2 million, which matters because the stock is still far below its prior high and management is putting personal capital to work into the pullback.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Charter is a deep-value, high-short-interest squeeze candidate with insider buying, but subscriber losses and leverage keep risk elevated.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: MannKind has a binary FDA event on July 26 for the FUROSCIX ReadyFlow autoinjector, and BiopharmaWatch highlights a meaningful approval probability tied to a simple delivery-system expansion.
growth_picks.analyst_take: MannKind has a near-term FDA catalyst with positive free cash flow and strong margins, but the setup remains binary biotech risk.

catalysts_general: Discovery: NRG is one of the clearest AI-power beneficiaries as investors rotate toward energy names tied to data-center load growth, and the stock has already been re-rated on rising power-demand expectations.
growth_picks.analyst_take: NRG offers a cheap forward multiple and direct AI power-load exposure after a large pullback, though leverage and utility-cycle risk are real.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Zeta is getting a fresh catalyst from its Palantir partnership, with the market treating the deal as a potentially meaningful revenue unlock for its marketing automation platform.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Zeta has a credible AI-marketing catalyst through Palantir, strong growth and short-squeeze optionality at a reasonable forward multiple.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: This month, China and Western policymakers have intensified the critical-minerals fight, and MP Materials remains the core U.S. rare-earth producer most directly positioned to benefit from de-risking away from Chinese supply chains.
growth_picks.analyst_take: MP is the cleanest U.S. rare-earth policy beneficiary with squeeze optionality, but losses and negative free cash flow make it speculative.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group reported a July 15, 2026 buy of 5,906,542 Jefferies shares at $53.96, about $318.7M, which is large enough to qualify as a meaningful institutional stake build rather than routine trading.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Jefferies has strategic optionality from SMFG's stake build plus reasonable valuation, making it a buyable capital-markets recovery/takeout setup.

catalysts_general: Discovery: IBM just suffered a historic 25% selloff and still sits about 36% below its 52-week high, with final Q2 results due July 22, 2026; the setup is attractive because the stock is now priced for a real miss, but the bear case is that the warning reflected genuine execution issues and a customer spending shift, not just panic.
growth_picks.analyst_take: The 25% collapse created a cheaper FCF story, but the warning exposed real execution and customer budget-allocation problems.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Barron's highlighted Bloom Energy's expanded Brookfield AI-infrastructure partnership at $25 billion, reinforcing that on-site power generation is becoming a bottleneck-solver for AI data centers.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Bloom is positioned for AI data-center power demand, but the stock already capitalizes much of the Brookfield upside.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Simply Wall St's July 6 AI-screen writeup said Oracle's OCI plus OpenAI partnership is helping build some of the largest GPU superclusters and feeding a very large contracted backlog, making it one of the clearest monetized AI infrastructure/software hybrids.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Oracle has enormous AI-cloud backlog and a cheap forward P/E after a collapse, but the cash-flow and credit risks are too large for a buy.

catalysts_general: Discovery: This week's IBD coverage said Datadog is nearing a buy point after raising full-year revenue guidance to $4.3 billion-$4.34 billion, while its AI observability, security and GPU-monitoring products keep pulling in larger customers.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Datadog is a real AI observability winner, but valuation and insider selling make it hard to chase near highs.

catalysts_general: Discovery: A massive ownership add by Mitsui Sumitomo stands out as a high-conviction insider-style signal in a profitable insurer with strong capital discipline.
growth_picks.analyst_take: W.R. Berkley is a quality P&C insurer with strong ROE and capital returns, but upside is limited at the current price.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Intel has a binary earnings date on July 23, 2026, and the market is watching whether the turnaround can keep comping through the semiconductor slump.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Intel has a near-term turnaround catalyst and new packaging leadership, but the financial profile is not yet strong enough for a buy.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Quanta remains one of the clearest individual beneficiaries of the AI power-grid and reshoring trade that is rotating into industrial infrastructure.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Quanta is one of the clearest AI grid-infrastructure beneficiaries, but valuation already discounts a lot of backlog growth.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Comfort Systems has been a standout AI data-center construction winner and still screens as a favored industrial compounder in the rotation.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Comfort Systems has exceptional data-center backlog and earnings momentum, but valuation and insider selling argue against chasing.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Raytheon, RTX’s defense arm, received a July 9 Navy order for $101.98M to restart the MK 45 Capsule Launch System production line and a July 7 Space Force prototype modification, giving RTX direct exposure to the global missile-reload cycle as NATO and U.S. stockpile pressure stays elevated.
growth_picks.analyst_take: RTX has strong missile and aerospace demand, but valuation, limited upside, and Pratt & Whitney risks keep it below buy.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: The White House kept 50% steel and aluminum tariffs in place and broadened derivative coverage, while AP reported a new 25% tariff on selected Brazilian imports starting July 22; that combination tightens import competition and should support domestic steel pricing for Nucor.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Nucor benefits from U.S. steel tariffs and domestic demand, but cyclical steel risk and negative FCF reduce the margin of safety.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Reuters said on July 1 that U.S. LNG exports to Europe are declining as Asia prices surge, and recent Hormuz-related gas tightness has kept global LNG markets strained; Cheniere is the most direct U.S.-listed beneficiary because it can redirect cargoes into the highest-priced basin while running near capacity.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheniere has record export execution and tight global LNG tailwinds, but leverage and limited upside keep it at hold.

catalysts_general: Discovery: CEO Jack Jiajia Huang bought 213,480 shares for about $3.68M on Jul 13, 186,840 shares for about $3.21M on Jul 9, 95,040 shares for about $1.59M on Jul 10, and 211,260 shares for about $3.53M on Jul 7, which is a rare multi-day open-market cluster totaling well over $10M.
growth_picks.analyst_take: The CEO buying cluster is notable, but the purchases appear plan-driven and the microcap still lacks enough profitability and balance-sheet quality for a buy.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Arista launched a next-generation 1.6Terabit portfolio for AI fabrics on July 7, keeping it positioned as a direct winner from higher-speed cluster networking and the shift to scale-up and scale-out AI networks.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Arista is a high-quality AI networking winner, but the stock is close to highs and already prices in much of the 1.6T cycle.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Palantir rebounded on a new Nvidia partnership for U.S. government AI even after a brutal June selloff, keeping it one of the clearest examples of AI software translating into large-scale operational deployments and recurring demand.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Palantir's Nvidia/government AI momentum is real, but the valuation is too demanding for a fresh buy at this price.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Snowflake's second-quarter fiscal 2026 results showed product revenue of $1.09 billion, up 32% year over year, while its AI Data Cloud and Cortex push keeps the company squarely in the enterprise AI workload monetization lane.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Snowflake has regained growth credibility through AI Data Cloud execution, but valuation and proximity to highs argue against chasing.

catalysts_general: Discovery: LW is 30.0% below its 52-week high, still profitable, and trades at a 16.0x forward P/E; the July 24, 2026 BMO earnings report is the near-term catalyst, while analyst upgrades, insider buying, and potato-trade/facility actions could help reset margin expectations, though leverage and near-term EPS pressure remain the bear case.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Lamb Weston is cheap enough to watch into earnings, but margin deterioration and leverage prevent a clean turnaround buy.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Oscar Health stands out because CEO Mark Bertolini made a very large open-market purchase of roughly $11.9 million, a high-conviction insider signal after the stock pulled back from stronger levels.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Oscar has real growth and a prior CEO purchase, but the stock now trades above targets and recent tax-related sales weaken the insider signal.

catalysts_general: Discovery: On July 17, 2026, Chevron signed Iraqi agreements that include a pipeline intended to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, giving the company a direct lever on alternative export routes and regional production growth.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Chevron is a high-quality energy security beneficiary, but the Iraq/Hormuz catalyst is early-stage and current upside is not compelling enough for a buy.

catalysts_general: Discovery: With July 2026 Hormuz crossings down sharply and tanker attacks pushing oil above $90, International Seaways is leveraged to tighter crude-shipping capacity and higher spot rates.
growth_picks.analyst_take: International Seaways is benefiting from tanker tightness and Hormuz disruption, but the stock is near highs and spot-rate cyclicality argues for patience.

catalysts_general: Discovery: On July 2, 2026, CEO and Chairman Horacio Daniel Marin bought 2,840 shares at $46.35 for about $131,634 and VP Upstream Matias Osvaldo Farina bought 8,875 shares at $45.22 for about $401,296, a same-day open-market insider cluster totaling roughly $533K.
growth_picks.analyst_take: YPF has a strong Vaca Muerta growth story and insider buying, but Argentina, litigation and cash-flow risks keep it out of buy territory.
